name: ElAgente Harness Tools
description: Managed MCP tools for discovering and invoking ElAgenteHarness chemistry modules from sandbox workers.

modelHints.text: ElAgenteHarness chemistry tools are available through MCP when the sandbox has chemistry enabled. Use harness_status to check readiness, harness_home for root discovery, harness_help and harness_list_tools to inspect modules, and harness_invoke_tool for approved JSON tool calls. Do not ask for or print INACT_X_APP_KEY.
